summary: Tested combo prop feature and cache endpoints. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend login and navigation verified. Scan tab shows 'Scan a Prop' header with upload zone. Tracking tab displays saved picks with projections. Combo prop UI elements (COMBO PROP badge, Users icon, resolvedPlayers handling) are implemented in App.js.
passed_tests: GET /api/cache/status returns valid counts (leagues, teams, players, nationalTeams)
GET /api/cache/lookup/player?name=Saka finds B. Saka (word boundary, not Wan-Bissaka)
GET /api/cache/lookup/player?name=Salah&team_id=40 finds Mohamed Salah at Liverpool
POST /api/scan-prop returns 422 on empty body (endpoint reachable)
POST /api/scan-prop returns 422/500 on invalid base64 (proper error handling)
POST /api/scan-prop endpoint exists and handles validation errors
GET /api/cache/national-teams returns list of national teams
Frontend login page loads with email input and VERIFY ACCESS button
Frontend login with josselj001@gmail.com (owner) works - auto-login via Whop
Frontend Scan tab shows 'Scan a Prop' header and upload zone
Frontend Tracking tab shows saved picks with projections
Frontend navigation between SCAN PROP and TRACKING tabs works
critical_code_review_comments: scan.py properly detects isCombo from GPT-4o Vision response and returns it in extracted object
scan.py resolves both players for combo props via _resolve_player_via_cache and returns resolvedPlayers array
App.js handleScanPredict correctly branches for combo props (lines 475-548) calling predictCombo()
App.js scan result card renders COMBO PROP badge with Users icon for combo props (lines 1776-1784)
App.js displays both player names and teams for combo props (lines 1803-1813)

test_credentials.owner_email: josselj001@gmail.com (auto-login via verify-whop, no password needed)

seed_data_creation: None - using existing MongoDB cache data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Combo prop feature verified. Backend scan.py returns isCombo field and resolvedPlayers array for combo props. Frontend App.js renders COMBO PROP badge with purple styling and Users icon. Cache endpoints working: player lookups with word-boundary and accent-stripped matching, team lookups for club and national teams. Login with josselj001@gmail.com works via Whop verification.

backend_implementation.scan_py_isCombo_detection: GPT-4o Vision prompt instructs to detect combo props and set isCombo field
backend_implementation.scan_py_resolvedPlayers: _resolve_player_via_cache called for each combo player, returns resolvedPlayers array
backend_implementation.scan_py_response_schema: extracted object includes isCombo: true/false, players array for combos

frontend_implementation.handleScanPredict_combo_branch: Lines 475-548 - detects isCombo and calls predictCombo() instead of predict()
frontend_implementation.combo_prop_badge: Lines 1776-1784 - renders 'COMBO PROP' badge with purple styling and Users icon
frontend_implementation.combo_player_display: Lines 1803-1813 - shows both player names and teams from resolvedPlayers array
